title: Best Colleges for M.A Political Science in Delhi NCR/Noida
content: Bachelor Degree with minimum 50% marks or equivalent. Students having CUET Score will be given preference in merit International Relations | Comparative Politics | Political Thought | Indian Politics | Third World Studies | Women in Political Process | Public Policy | Public Administration | Nationalism and Transnational Politics | Contemporary Political Ideologies | India in World Politics | Modern Political Thinkers | Indian Foreign Policy | 01 Create a strong knowledge base about political affairs 02 Relate to philosophical issues in political affairs 03 Help decode policies and their relevance 04 Explain the impact of political issues on individuals, groups and society 05 Facilitate critical learning, creative thinking and rational analysis 06 Connect theoretical constructs to pragmatic issues 07 Engage in intellectual discourses in socio-political affairs 08 Enable to gauge the links between politics and human life 09 Foster intellectual and positive analysis in individual and group platforms 10 Ability to relate recent political development in post-truth era 01 Post-Graduates will be able to analyze and optimize political concepts in the field of Research. 02 Post-Graduates will develop the ability to work efficiently as leader/team member with an integrated view as Civil Services, researchers, lawyers or media persons. 03 Post-Graduates can explore career in Social activism, active politics or NGOs 01 Identify and analyze the national and international political issues and ability to provide solutions. 02 Apprehend and evaluate the impact of political decisions, administrative policies and demonstrate the knowledge of political affairs. 03 Prepare professionals for meaningful participation in political engagements and communications.
